events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: The legendary Ringo Starr hits 86 today! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the incomparable Brian May! His guitar work with Queen is simply out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young! Mick Jagger continues to define rock 'n' roll. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Classic
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. A true Britpop masterpiece. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: King Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley today. His impact on music and culture remains unmatched.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur on music and culture today. His words still resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on guitar playing is eternal.

events.title: The Beatles 'Abbey Road' anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Magic
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles walked across that famous zebra crossing for 'Abbey Road'. A timeless album.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' anniversary (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity is as powerful as ever.

events.title: First iPod released (2001)
events.blurb: Apple launched the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did yours hold?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the extraordinary life and music of John Lennon. Imagine.
